title: medicago prostrata subsp. pseudorupestris
intro: Medicago prostrata subsp. pseudorupestris, also known as a perennial species of clover, is a type of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Medicago prostrata subsp. pseudorupestris include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting antioxidant properties that can help protect against cell damage. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
